title: Survival Enhanced [FORGE]
description: A Minecraft Modpack that add 200+ mods that helps Minecraft and makes exploration even better.
body:
# SURVIVAL ENHANCED

*This Modpack is the first by DuskForge Interactive we hope you like our first Modpack!*

 

---

A Minecraft Modpack that add 200+ mods that helps Minecraft and makes exploration even better.

*NO OPTIFINE NEEDED: Access Shaders in Video Settings > Shader Packs > Add your Shader* 

 ---

**This Modpack is a very demanding modpack**

 ---

*Some of the 1.18.2 Features:*

- Oh The Biomes You’ll Go World Generation [Adds New Overworld, Nether & End Biomes]

- Biomes O’ Plenty

- Upgrade the Vanilla biomes with Hals Enhanced Biomes mod

- Tons of NEW Dungeons & Structures from Dungeon Crawl, When Dungeons Arise.

- Upgraded Netherite [New Netherite Gear]

- Journey mini map mod

- Adds 2 New Dimension [Blue Skies & The Undergarden

- Adds a bunch of mobs like Creatures From the Lush Caves! & Minecraft Earth Mods, Warden & Sculk and adds the cute Copper Golem that lost to the Allay back at Minecraft Live 2021, Also adds the Iceologer that lost to the useless Glow Squid back at Minecraft Live 2020.

- Updated the wolf/dogs

- Why only have a stone cutter and not a wood cutter? So that’s why we the mod Corail Woodcutter

- The mod Create

- Obviously WitherKing had to add More Axolotl Variants Mod

- Do you kill villagers by accident? Well with the mod Villagers Respawn you don’t have to worry about them dying as they will just respawn at their beds

- You don’t like a villager trades? Instead of killing the villager you can now retrain the villager with the mod Retraining

- The Best backpack mod that Minecraft has Traveler’s Backpack

- Ever wanted improved night time events? That’s why we added Enhanced Celestials Mod that aims to improve the overall environment of the night by adding Luna events such as Blood Moons & Harvest Moons & Blue Moons.

- MrCrayfish’s Furniture Mod

---

**Some mods links that are required by the mod author** 

- Amplified Nether: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/amplified-nether
- Aquaculture: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture
- Hals Enhanced Biomes: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hals-enhanced-biomes/files/3496388
- Merchant Markers: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/merchant-markers
- Waddles: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waddles
- Azalea: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-azalea
- Better Respawn: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-respawn
- Create Compressed: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-compressed
- Create Recycle: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything
- Duckling: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/duckling
- Easy Piglins: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-piglins
- Easy Villagers: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-villagers
- Gravestone: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod
- MoreVillagers: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers
- Polylib: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/polylib
- Sprout: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sprout
- FreshAnimations: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations

---

**FABRIC VS FORGE**

*Both Loaders have their own Unique Mods and that do share some similar Mods but they both provide different experiences*

---

Trailer Coming soon
